title: About - Andy McDonald MP
text_excerpt: About - Andy McDonald MP Skip to main content Andy McDonald MP Middlesbrough and Thornaby East Home About Contact Us Surgeries Latest Newsletter More Search Search the website Search Menu About Welcome to my website. Please feel free to take a look at my blog page with articles on issues I have taken up. Also on this site are my recent press releases on local and national issues. If you have a query or an issue you would like to raise with me please complete the contact form on the website or call my office on 01642 246574 and we will do our best to help you. Andy McDonald MP Andy McDonald MP Contact details Fry St, Middlesbrough TS1 1HA, UK View on Google Maps Email: andy.mcdonald.2nd@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Lewis Young at Transport House, Fry Street, Middlesbrough.
